synthesize.title: Synthesize TTS audio
synthesize.alreadyPending: An identical job is already pending — no new job was created.
synthesize.alreadyExists: Asset already generated — no new job was created.

cancelJob.title: Cancel pending TTS job
cancelJob.description: Request cancellation of a pending audio narration job. If the worker has already swapped the result, the cancel may not take effect.
cancelJob.swapCompleted: Cancel requested but the worker already swapped the result.
cancelJob.alreadyFailed: Job already failed — nothing to cancel.
